name: Dusty Rose Anarkali Kurta
description: Elegant dusty rose Anarkali set featuring intricate thread embroidery with a flowy layered silhouette. Paired with matching bottoms and a soft dupatta, perfect for festive occasions.

description: Elegant beige kurta crafted from breathable cotton, featuring intricate golden thread embroidery. Designed with a mandarin collar and classic straight silhouette, ideal for festive gatherings.

description: A sleek black hoodie designed for kids who love comfort with a modern edge. Crafted from a soft cotton blend with a clean minimal design, perfect for everyday wear.

description: Chic casual outfit featuring a maroon vertical striped shirt paired with high-waisted beige straight-fit pants. Perfect for everyday wear, office styling, or casual outings.

name: Ivory Indo-Western Kurta Set
description: Regal ivory Indo-western kurta set featuring intricate embroidery and a matching sleeveless jacket. Paired with dhoti-style bottoms, perfect for weddings and grand festive occasions.

description: A trendy outfit set for young girls featuring a soft knit sweater with bow patterns, paired with a classic pleated skirt. Perfect for casual outings and school events.
